arts.sum: RB: Jules Kounde - Despite a flurry of injuries across Barca's squad, Kounde has proved a reliable provider at right-back so far this season. The Catalan giants have made a remarkable start to the Hansi Flick era and have won seven of their opening eight matches in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Barcelona, Atletico Madrid 'battling for £42m Arsenal star' amid contract uncertainty
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid reportedly show an interest in re-signing Thomas Partey from Arsenal next summer but face competition from Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Nico quizzed on his future again amid continued Barca talk
arts.sum: Nico Williams has been asked about his future at Athletic Club after a summer which saw him heavily linked with a move to Barcelona. Williams has been asked about his future in a new interview with AS and was quizzed specifically on the fact that he has previously said he’d decided to stay for the rest of the year.

Barcelona are growing 'concerned' about Vitor Roque's performances at Real Betis, according to Spanish media. The German was open to keeping Roque around, but Barcelona's financial situation made it necessary to shift bodies and the 19-year-old was loaned to Real Betis, with the Seville-based club boasting a €25 million purchase option.

arts.ttl: Ansu Fati offered January exit option by Barcelona
arts.sum: Ansu Fati could be offered a chance to leave Barcelona in January if he fails to break into their La Liga plans. Fati returned to Catalonia this summer, determined to put his injury issues behind him, and revive his La Blaugrana career. However, a fresh setback in preseason knocked his progress, and saw him playing catch […] The post Ansu Fati offered January exit option by Barcelona appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Barcelona identify their ‘no.1’ free agent target for next summer

arts.ttl: How Wojciech Szczęsny has ‘surprised’ the Barcelona coaching staff
arts.sum: New Barcelona signing Wojciech Szczęsny has left the club’s coaching staff ‘pleasantly surprised’, on the back of his first training sessions with the club. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, who…

arts.ttl: Barcelona preparing anniversary invite for Lionel Messi
arts.sum: The board at La Liga giants Barcelona have begun preparations to invite club icon Lionel Messi to an upcoming gala. That’s according to Relevo, who have on Saturday provided an…

arts.ttl: Barca register Szczęsny before Alaves clash
arts.sum: Barcelona have registered new goalkeeper Wojciech Szczęsny with La Liga ahead of their next match against Alaves on Sunday. Szczęsny has joined the club after coming out of retirement and has already been training with the team .

arts.ttl: Barcelona eyeing summer 2025 swoop for OGC Nice star
arts.sum: The powers that be at La Liga giants Barcelona have earmarked OGC Nice star Marcin Bulka as a transfer target for the summer of 2025. That’s according to Diario Sport,…
